composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Specify how the parent extracts 'user_id', 'channel_id', 'content', 'channel_name' from 'message_data' based on the 'command' value. Also define the routing logic for each command (e.g., 'send_message' uses ValidateUserMembership, StoreMessage, UpdateUserLastSeen, NotifyChannelMembers; 'get_history' uses RetrieveMessageHistory; 'create_channel' uses CreateChannel; 'join_channel' uses JoinChannel).
